economic_notes: Nation has investments in Six Nations Ventures L.P. (16.6%), Uujo Development L.P. (100%), and Uujo Management G.P. Ltd. (100%). New investments in Kathairos Solutions Inc. and 548 Trading Co. during the year. Community Development Trust manages Treaty Land Entitlement Claim settlement, Agriculture Benefits Claim settlement, and Heritage Trust Fund Transfer. Doig River Cattle L.P. and Doig River Aggregate L.P. are consolidated subsidiaries.
notes: Large Community Development Trust with portfolio investments of $145.6M. Treaty Land Entitlement Claim settlement in prior year (2023) resulted in massive surplus of $161.7M including $235.5M TLE revenue and large distributions to adult and minor members. Prior year one-time items include TLE revenue $235,535,106, distributions to adult members $53,750,000, and distributions to minors $31,821,265. Deferred revenue increased significantly from $16.9M to $32.6M. Trust distributions due to adult members decreased from $18.9M to $7.7M as distributions continue to be paid out. Long-term debt reduced significantly from $11.4M to $2.1M. Remuneration schedule not included in provided text. Expenses by program extracted from segment schedule on statement of operations.
